summary: Unified prescriptive requirements for OpenTelemetry instrumentation and distributed tracing

groups.name: OpenTelemetry Instrumentation
groups.summary: Request instrumentation and distributed tracing capabilities

requirements.title: Install OpenTelemetry Dependencies
requirements.statement: The system SHALL install required OpenTelemetry libraries

acceptance.outcome: Required packages (opentelemetry-sdk, opentelemetry-exporter-otlp) are present in package.json

requirements.title: Configure OpenTelemetry SDK
requirements.statement: The system SHALL initialize OpenTelemetry with default configurations

acceptance.outcome: SDK is configured with default settings and service name

rules.rule: All traces must include request context
Traces must be exported to OTLP endpoint
